priority_models.name: Meta: Llama 3.3 70B Instruct
priority_models.description: Explore the pricing for Meta's Llama 3.3 70B Instruct API. This page details the cost structure for machine learning engineers evaluating large language models. The Llama 3.3 70B Instruct API is offered by meta-llama and features a 131,072 token context window. Input tokens are priced at $0.10000 per 1 million tokens, while output tokens cost $0.32000 per 1 million tokens, totaling $0.4200 per 1 million tokens. For example, if your application processes 100 million tokens monthly, the estimated cost would be $42.00. Compare Llama 3.3 70B Instruct API pricing against other LLM APIs to optimize your machine learning budget.
